id REQ-CHANGE-OBSERVATORY-001 kind requirement schema_version requirement v1 title Install-integrated SDLC Change Observatory summary Provide a local visual application shipped inside the Agentic SDLC plugin that reconstructs what was requested decided changed verified and released across stories phases contracts and iterations for technical and non-technical readers. status proposed acceptance_criteria After plugin installation agentic-sdlc observe --root <project> launches the included application without a separate build or cloud service. # Architecture Agentic SDLC separates the reusable method from project-specific knowledge. ```text Codex plugin -> skill instructions -> templates -> schemas -> cross-platform CLI Target project -> .sdlc/ -> baseline -> assessments -> budgets -> contracts -> authorizations -> authorization-uses -> receipts -> capability-discovery -> output-contracts -> work-items -> work-breakdown -> dependencies -> stories -> orchestration -> locks -> handoffs -> decisions -> traces -> tests -> releases -> manifests -> archive -> cache -> indexes ``` ```mermaid flowchart TB subgraph Plugin Reusable plugin Ski
